title: tetragonanthus multiflorus
intro: Tetragonanthus multiflorus, also known as the bushy ironplow or four-angled ironplow, is a flowering plant species in the family Rubiaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Tetragonanthus multiflorus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and exhibit antioxidant activities, making it a valuable herb for treating various health conditions. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
